evidence: standards/enterprise/modern-testing.md, ADR-0011, and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Unavailable executable-code evidence requires the exact command or capability, failure reason, risk, owner, alternate evidence, expiry, and restoration plan; generated or self-reported green text is never accepted.
statement: Claims about executable-code builds, tests, or performance MUST cite observed command-backed results and relevant context; documentation consistency uses the plan's final AI review instead of fabricated runtime evidence.
